title: adonis aestivalis f. citrina
intro: Adonis aestivalis f. citrina, also known as the yellow rocket, is a flowering plant species in the genus Adonis. It is a perennial herb used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Adonis aestivalis f. citrina are attributed to its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant is prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat various ailments, including fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
